---
id: "19.2.10"
title: "Nutanix AOS, AHV, NCC, and LCM version compliance"
criticality: "high"
splunkPillar: "IT Operations"
---

# UC-19.2.10 · Nutanix AOS, AHV, NCC, and LCM version compliance

## Description

Correlates Splunk_TA_nutanix cluster and AHV host inventory with a customer HEC poller of Prism LCM v4 and NCC health check APIs to compute AOS and AHV pins against a governance table, LCM inventory freshness, NCC minimums, and support-window EOL, then assigns a five-bucket severity with change-freeze demotion and routes tickets to platform lifecycle owners.

## Value

Support contracts, one-click LCM, and NCC prechecks all assume a single coherent story about which AOS line you run, which AHV build pins to that AOS, whether LCM’s catalog was refreshed, and how far you are from your own N-minus policy. This use case makes that story visible in one Splunk row per cluster, so a drift toward retired AOS, a stuck AHV during an incomplete rolling apply, a stale LCM inventory, a failed LCM run, or an NCC too old to trust prechecks is visible before a weekend change fails at the first Nutanix gate, and before auditors ask for evidence you only had in a spreadsheet.

## Implementation

Deploy Splunk_TA_nutanix, stand up the HEC poller for the four custom sourcetypes, publish the two governance CSVs with transforms, dry-run the SPL against one lab cluster, then schedule the search every five minutes with cluster_uuid throttle, route to platform and change teams, and attach ITSI or ServiceNow per Step 4. Refresh the AOS support catalog on each public AOS release cycle.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Splunk Add-on for Nutanix Prism (folder Splunk_TA_nutanix, Splunkbase 5076) on a data-collection node with outbound TCP 9440 to Prism Element and on Search Heads for field discovery. The TA covers nutanix:cluster and nutanix:host; it does not ship modular inputs for LCM v4 inventory, LCM v4 resource entities, LCM v4 operation history, or a dedicated NCC check-status stream — you must add a custom HEC poller for those sourcetypes. Pin the TA in change control; field renames between TA minors are the reason the SPL uses long coalesce lists.
• Index placement: examples use (index=hci OR index=nutanix) — your inputs.conf index must be allowed for the search role.
• A customer-owned wrapper app that ships default/props.conf for nutanix:lcm:inventory, nutanix:lcm:available_versions, nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history, and nutanix:ncc:check_status (SHOULD_LINEMERGE = false, large TRUNCATE, JSON), default/transforms.conf for the two lookup names below, and lookups/nutanix_lcm_target_versions.csv and lookups/nutanix_supported_aos_catalog.csv with the exact governance columns in Step 1.
• Python 3.11+ on the poller host for the HEC path (stdlib is enough if you avoid heavy dependencies), TLS trust to Prism, secrets file mode 600, and logging to a local file before you add cron or systemd timers.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Data contracts: Sourcetype nutanix:cluster comes from Splunk_TA_nutanix polling Prism Element GET /PrismGateway/services/rest/v2.0/cluster/; fields include the running AOS string in version (for example 6.5.5.7), cluster name, id, cluster_uuid, hypervisor_types, and related MO keys. Sourcetype nutanix:host comes from GET /PrismGateway/services/rest/v2.0/hosts/; fields include hypervisor_full_name, hypervisor_version, node identity, and maintenance state. AHV is not “whatever CentOS version the hypervisor is based on” — the vendor pins a specific AHV build for each AOS line; the hypervisor_full_name string is the release tag to compare, not a generic Linux distribution version.

LCM and NCC that the TA does not cover: (1) nutanix:lcm:inventory from GET /PrismGateway/services/rest/v1.0/genesis/lcm/inventory_status — capture inventory_in_progress, last_inventory_time, and inventory_age_seconds. Some sites must POST a refresh before GET; loop GET until inventory_in_progress is false, then HEC. (2) nutanix:lcm:available_versions from GET /api/lcm/v4.0.b1/resources/entities — flatten AOS, AHV, NCC, Foundation, disk firmware, and NIC firmware rows with recommended_version, available_version_list, current, and a scalar you control such as ahv_mismatch when a live host tag is not in the list that matches the running AOS pin. (3) nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history from GET /api/lcm/v4.0.b1/operations with $filter=type eq 'UPGRADE' (URL-encode in your poller) — include status, from_version, to_version, error_message, time bounds. (4) nutanix:ncc:check_status from GET /PrismGateway/services/rest/v2.0/health_checks with detailedInfo=true — include ncc_version, last_ncc_run_time, failed_check_count, and an optional ncc_info_warning_count for the low precheck path.

LCM v4 session reality: the v4 LCM service often needs the same session, cookie, and cluster fingerprint the Prism web UI uses; Basic auth alone may work for v2.0 in the TA but return 401 on v4. Cache expiry, resend a fresh session when you get 401, and never log raw secrets.

HEC: token on the indexer or heavy tier, allow only the poller, index hci unless policy splits indices. Watch HEC 4xx and timeouts — large entity pages need TRUNCATE high on props and batch sizing tuned in the poller.

Lookups: nutanix_lcm_target_versions holds cluster_uuid, cluster_name, target_aos_version, target_ahv_version, target_ncc_version, aos_n_minus_allowed, ahv_n_minus_allowed, business_service, owner_email, change_freeze_until (ISO-8601 or date). Per-cluster N policy — tier-1 may allow 1, dev may allow 3. nutanix_supported_aos_catalog holds aos_version, release_date_epoch, is_lts, is_sts, is_supported_until_epoch, compatible_ahv_versions (store pipe-joined in one field for simpler string tests), min_ncc_version, notes, and lineage_rank (an integer monotonic within your AOS LTS/STS map so the SPL can subtract from target to estimate steps behind; refresh on each Nutanix AOS release cycle, about every eight weeks).

Optional Splunk_TA_nix: only in Step 5, forward ncli cluster info and ncli host ls from CVMs into a lab index for evidence when REST is blocked; do not let duplicate CLI and API streams into the same alert without a dedup or filter.

Python sketch for the inventory POST/GET loop (headers simplified — follow your org’s real auth and TLS):

import json, ssl, time, urllib.request
base = "https://PRISM_FQDN:9440/PrismGateway/services/rest/v1.0"
inv = base + "/genesis/lcm/inventory_status"
def read_inv():
  req = urllib.request.Request(inv, method="GET")
  req.add_header("Authorization", "Basic BASE64")  # or token header your build requires
  ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
  return json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=120).read().decode("utf-8"))
# optional: urllib.request.Request(inv, data=b"{}", method="POST") to trigger refresh, then read_inv() in a small loop
for attempt in range(10):
  body = read_inv()
  if str(body.get("inventory_in_progress", "false")).lower() in ("1","true","t","yes"):
    time.sleep(30)
    continue
  hec = {"sourcetype": "nutanix:lcm:inventory", "event": { "cluster_uuid": "REPLACE", "last_inventory_time": body.get("last_inventory_time"), "inventory_in_progress": False, "inventory_age_seconds": body.get("inventory_age_seconds", 0) } }
  break
# then POST hec to https://SPLUNK_HEC:8088/services/collector/event

Sourcetype to REST map for auditors: nutanix:cluster v2.0 /cluster, nutanix:host v2.0 /hosts, nutanix:lcm:inventory v1.0 /genesis/lcm/inventory_status, nutanix:lcm:available_versions LCM v4 /resources/entities, nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history LCM v4 /operations, nutanix:ncc:check_status v2.0 /health_checks.

Step 2 — Create search and alert
AOS LTS and STS: LTS (Long-Term Support) lines stay eligible for support longer; STS (Short-Term Support) lines advance quickly and can reach EOL while still technically “current” in a lab. Governance should pin tier-1 to AOS LTS and document acceptable lag with aos_n_minus_allowed, not a casual STS choice.

Why mixed AHV is serious: a rolling AHV one-click can leave nodes on different tags for a short, vendor-expected window. If distinct AHV at cluster scope stays above one for more than twenty-four hours, you are not in a clean apply — you are in stuck LCM, partial abort, or untracked host-level edits, which breaks precheck assumptions the next time you use one-click or Foundation for imaging.

The SPL below is the only canonical search string; schedule it on a short cadence, throttle on cluster_uuid, and route to platform and change owners, not primary storage on-call, unless a linked hardware finding already owns that queue.

The savedsearch.conf fragment (tune action paths — example only):

[uc-19-2-10-lcm]
disabled = 0
is_scheduled = 1
cron_schedule = 5 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -1h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
alert.suppress = 1
alert.suppress.fields = cluster_uuid
alert.suppress.period = 3600s
action.email = 1
action.email.to = platform-lcm@example.com
search = < paste from the spl field in this use case file >

Fenced copy for test notebooks (must match the top-level spl field in this JSON file):

```spl
`comment("UC-19.2.10 — Nutanix AOS, AHV, NCC, LCM compliance and EOL detection. SOURCES: nutanix:cluster, nutanix:host, nutanix:lcm:inventory, nutanix:lcm:available_versions, nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history, nutanix:ncc:check_status; LOOKUPS: nutanix_lcm_target_versions, nutanix_supported_aos_catalog; FREEZE: change_freeze_until.")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:cluster" earliest=-1h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, tostring(id))
      | eval cluster_name=coalesce(name, clusterName, cluster_name, cluster)
      | eval current_aos_version=coalesce(version, aos_version, cluster_version, AOSVersion)
      | eval src="clu" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:host" earliest=-1h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval hypv=coalesce(hypervisor_version, hypervisorVersion)
      | eval hfn=coalesce(hypervisor_full_name, hypervisorFullName, hypervisorFullname)
      | where isnotnull(cluster_uuid) AND len(tostring(cluster_uuid))>0
      | eval hvk=if(isnotnull(hypv) AND len(trim(tostring(hypv)))>0, tostring(hypv), tostring(hfn))
      | stats dc(hvk) as distinct_ahv_versions values(hvk) as current_ahv_versions min(_time) as first_host_time by cluster_uuid
      | eval current_ahv_strings=mvjoin(current_ahv_versions, "|")
      | eval src="hst" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:inventory" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval last_inventory_time=tonumber(coalesce(last_inventory_time, lastInventoryTime, "0"), 10)
      | eval inv_s=tonumber(coalesce(inventory_age_seconds, inventoryAgeSeconds, "0"), 10)
      | eval src="lcmi" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:available_versions" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval ahv_mismatch=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(ahv_mismatch, ahvIncompat, ahv_mismatch_count, "0")), 10)
      | eval src="lcmv" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | sort 0 - _time
      | dedup cluster_uuid
      | eval st=coalesce(status, Status, last_status, upg_status, "")
      | eval last_lcm_upgrade_status=trim(tostring(st))
      | eval src="lcmh" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:ncc:check_status" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval ncc_version=coalesce(ncc_version, nccVersion, nccV)
      | eval fcnt=tonumber(coalesce(failed_check_count, failedCheckCount, "0"), 10)
      | eval kw=tonumber(coalesce(ncc_info_warning_count, kWarningCount, precheck_info_warn, "0"), 10)
      | eval src="ncc" ]
| eval ckey=coalesce(cluster_uuid, "NONE")
| where ckey!="NONE" AND isnotnull(ckey)
| stats latest(eval(if((src="clu"), current_aos_version, null()))) as current_aos_version
    latest(eval(if((src="clu"), cluster_name, null()))) as clu_name
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), distinct_ahv_versions, null()))) as distinct_ahv_versions
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), current_ahv_strings, null()))) as current_ahv_strings
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), first_host_time, null()))) as first_host_time
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmi"), last_inventory_time, null()))) as last_inventory_time
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmi"), inv_s, null()))) as inv_s
    max(eval(if((src="lcmi"), _time, null()))) as last_inv_s_ev
    max(eval(if((src="lcmv"), ahv_mismatch, null()))) as ahv_mismatch
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmh"), last_lcm_upgrade_status, null()))) as last_lcm_upgrade_status
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), fcnt, null()))) as failed_check_count
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), ncc_version, null()))) as ncc_version
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), kw, null()))) as ncc_kwarn
  by ckey
| rename ckey as cluster_uuid
| eval cluster_name=if(isnotnull(clu_name) AND len(tostring(clu_name))>0, clu_name, tostring(cluster_uuid))
| eval current_ahv_versions=if(isnotnull(current_ahv_strings) AND len(tostring(current_ahv_strings))>0, current_ahv_strings, "unknown")
| eval last_inv=tonumber(tostring(last_inventory_time), 10)
| eval inv_s2=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(inv_s, 0)), 10)
| eval inventory_age_hours=if( (inv_s2>0), round((inv_s2/3600), 3), if( (last_inv>1), if( (last_inv>2000000000000), round(((now()-(last_inv/1000000.0))/3600), 3), if( (last_inv>2000000000), round(((now()-(last_inv/1000.0))/3600), 3), round(((now()-last_inv)/3600), 3) ) ), null() ) )
| eval mixed_persist=if( (isnotnull(distinct_ahv_versions)) AND (distinct_ahv_versions>1) AND (isnotnull(first_host_time)) AND ( (now()-first_host_time) > 86400 ), 1, 0)
| join type=left max=0 cluster_uuid
    [| inputlookup nutanix_lcm_target_versions
     | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, tostring(id))
     | eval cluster_name_lu=coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, tostring(name))
     | eval target_aos_version=coalesce(target_aos_version, targetAos, "")
     | eval target_ahv_version=coalesce(target_ahv_version, targetAhv, "")
     | eval target_ncc_version=coalesce(target_ncc_version, targetNcc, "")
     | eval aos_n_minus_allowed=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(aos_n_minus_allowed, "1")), 10)
     | eval ahv_n_minus_allowed=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(ahv_n_minus_allowed, "1")), 10)
     | eval business_service=coalesce(business_service, businessService, "")
     | eval owner_email=coalesce(owner_email, ownerEmail, "")
     | eval change_freeze_until=coalesce(change_freeze_until, changeFreezeUntil, "")
     | fields + cluster_uuid, cluster_name_lu, target_aos_version, target_ahv_version, target_ncc_version, aos_n_minus_allowed, ahv_n_minus_allowed, business_service, owner_email, change_freeze_until ]
| eval cluster_name=coalesce(cluster_name, cluster_name_lu, cluster_uuid)
| join type=left max=0 current_aos_version
    [| inputlookup nutanix_supported_aos_catalog
     | eval current_aos_version=coalesce(aos_version, aosVersion)
     | eval cur_lr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(lineage_rank, "0")), 10)
     | eval is_supported_until_epoch=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(is_supported_until_epoch, "0")), 10)
     | eval is_lts=if(match(lower(tostring(coalesce(is_lts, isLts, "false"))), "(1|t|y|true)"), 1, 0)
     | eval is_sts=if(match(lower(tostring(coalesce(is_sts, isSts, "false"))), "(1|t|y|true)"), 1, 0)
     | eval compatible_ahv_versions=coalesce(compatible_ahv_versions, compatibleAhv, "")
     | eval min_ncc_version=coalesce(min_ncc_version, minNcc, "")
     | fields + current_aos_version, cur_lr, is_supported_until_epoch, is_lts, is_sts, compatible_ahv_versions, min_ncc_version ]
| join type=left max=0 target_aos_version
    [| inputlookup nutanix_supported_aos_catalog
     | eval target_aos_version=coalesce(aos_version, aosVersion)
     | eval tgt_lr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(lineage_rank, "0")), 10)
     | fields + target_aos_version, tgt_lr ]
| fillnull value=0 cur_lr tgt_lr ahv_mismatch
| fillnull value=1 aos_n_minus_allowed
| eval n_minus_actual=if( (isnotnull(cur_lr)) AND (isnotnull(tgt_lr)) AND (tgt_lr>0) AND (cur_lr>0), if( (tgt_lr-cur_lr) > 0, tgt_lr - cur_lr, 0), null() )
| eval ahv_incompat=if( (isnotnull(ahv_mismatch)) AND (ahv_mismatch>0), 1, if( (isnotnull(compatible_ahv_versions)) AND (len(tostring(compatible_ahv_versions))>0) AND (isnotnull(mvindex(split(tostring(current_ahv_versions), "|"),0))) AND ( !like(compatible_ahv_versions, "%".tostring(mvindex(split(tostring(current_ahv_versions), "|"),0))."%") ) , 1, 0) )
| eval ncc_older=if( (isnotnull(min_ncc_version)) AND (len(tostring(min_ncc_version))>0) AND (isnotnull(ncc_version)) AND (tostring(ncc_version)!=tostring(min_ncc_version)) AND (tonumber(replace(tostring(ncc_version), "\\D", ""), 10) < tonumber(replace(tostring(min_ncc_version), "\\D", ""), 10)), 1, if( (isnotnull(ncc_version)) AND (isnotnull(min_ncc_version)) AND (tostring(ncc_version)<tostring(min_ncc_version)), 1, 0) )
| eval precheck_warn=if( ( (isnotnull(failed_check_count)) AND (failed_check_count>0) AND (failed_check_count<8) ) OR ( (isnotnull(ncc_kwarn)) AND (ncc_kwarn>0) ), 1, 0)
| eval cft1=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z")
| eval cft2=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval cft3=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")
| eval cft4=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%d")
| eval freeze_active=if( (isnotnull(cft1)) OR (isnotnull(cft2)) OR (isnotnull(cft3)) OR (isnotnull(cft4)), if( now() < coalesce(cft1, cft2, cft3, cft4, 0), 1, 0), 0 )
| eval sev0=case(
  (isnotnull(is_supported_until_epoch)) AND (is_supported_until_epoch>0) AND (is_supported_until_epoch<now()), "critical",
  (tostring(last_lcm_upgrade_status)="Failed"), "critical",
  (isnotnull(distinct_ahv_versions)) AND (mixed_persist=1), "high",
  (isnotnull(n_minus_actual)) AND (n_minus_actual>tonumber(tostring(aos_n_minus_allowed), 10)), "high",
  (ahv_incompat=1), "high",
  (ncc_older=1), "medium",
  (isnotnull(inventory_age_hours)) AND (inventory_age_hours>168), "medium",
  (precheck_warn=1), "low",
  1=1, "ok"
)
| eval severity_bucket=if( (freeze_active=1) AND ( (sev0="critical") OR (sev0="high") ), if( (sev0="critical"), "medium", "low" ), sev0 )
| table cluster_uuid, cluster_name, current_aos_version, target_aos_version, n_minus_actual, aos_n_minus_allowed, current_ahv_versions, target_ahv_version, distinct_ahv_versions, ncc_version, min_ncc_version, inventory_age_hours, is_supported_until_epoch, severity_bucket, freeze_active, business_service, owner_email
| sort 0 - severity_bucket, cluster_name
```

Step 3 — Validate
Run these on day one: (1) (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype=nutanix:cluster earliest=-1h@h | stats values(version) as v by cluster_uuid | where isnotnull(mvindex(v,0)) — proves AOS. (2) same index sourcetype=nutanix:host | stats values(hypervisor_version) as hv, dc(hypervisor_version) as dch by cluster_uuid — proves per-node AHV tags. (3) sourcetype=nutanix:lcm:inventory | eval ih=if(isnotnull(inventory_age_seconds), inventory_age_seconds/3600, null()) | where ih<24 — if zero rows, HEC is missing. (4) | inputlookup nutanix_supported_aos_catalog | head 1 — proves lookup load; join your production version string in dev and confirm is_supported_until_epoch in the future. (5) index=_internal log_level=error HEC 42 — proves transport when events vanish.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Build panels: a heatmap of n_minus_actual versus aos_n_minus_allowed, a table of mixed-AHV with distinct_ahv_versions, a NCC version column chart against min_ncc_version, a gauge of inventory_age_hours, and a timechart of nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history failures. Drill to Prism LCM and to raw HEC for error_message on Failed. ITSI: one service entity per cluster_uuid for lifecycle compliance; KPIs on severity_bucket, inventory_age_hours, and n_minus_actual; map dependencies to a generic platform service, not individual VMs. ServiceNow: include cluster_uuid, current_aos_version, target_aos_version, n_minus_actual, a computed eol_in_days (child search or eval), freeze_active, owner_email, business_service. Link escalation to a runbook step “schedule the next one-click LCM window and attach Nutanix prechecks,” not ad hoc SSH patches.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
LCM inventory older than 24h: re-run the POST/GET loop, confirm inventory_in_progress clears; if it never clears, triage Genesis health in UC-19.2.14 (Genesis supervises the inventory line). Mixed AHV for more than 24h: confirm the rolling AHV run finished or was aborted, then re-run a vendor-supported AHV LCM; avoid manual AHV file drops outside LCM. AOS catalog CSV stale: refresh lineage_rank, is_supported_until_epoch, and compatible_ahv_versions from Nutanix support matrices — OEM Lenovo nodes may still use XClarity out-of-band for firmware, which is expected “noise” in pure LCM rows until you add a side field. 401 to LCM v4 with working Prism login: switch the poller to the UI session, cookie, and fingerprint, not the Basic v2.0 path. inventory_in_progress stuck true: validate Genesis dependencies, time sync, and disk headroom, then TAC with genesis logs, cross-referencing UC-19.2.14. LTS/STS label mismatch for tier-1: fix governance, not the TA. HEC: timeout or SSL error — verify MTU, proxy, CA bundle, and indexer reachability; single silent failure often traces to a change in certificate chain on the poller.


## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-19.2.10 — Nutanix AOS, AHV, NCC, LCM compliance and EOL detection. SOURCES: nutanix:cluster, nutanix:host, nutanix:lcm:inventory, nutanix:lcm:available_versions, nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history, nutanix:ncc:check_status; LOOKUPS: nutanix_lcm_target_versions, nutanix_supported_aos_catalog; FREEZE: change_freeze_until.")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:cluster" earliest=-1h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, tostring(id))
      | eval cluster_name=coalesce(name, clusterName, cluster_name, cluster)
      | eval current_aos_version=coalesce(version, aos_version, cluster_version, AOSVersion)
      | eval src="clu" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:host" earliest=-1h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval hypv=coalesce(hypervisor_version, hypervisorVersion)
      | eval hfn=coalesce(hypervisor_full_name, hypervisorFullName, hypervisorFullname)
      | where isnotnull(cluster_uuid) AND len(tostring(cluster_uuid))>0
      | eval hvk=if(isnotnull(hypv) AND len(trim(tostring(hypv)))>0, tostring(hypv), tostring(hfn))
      | stats dc(hvk) as distinct_ahv_versions values(hvk) as current_ahv_versions min(_time) as first_host_time by cluster_uuid
      | eval current_ahv_strings=mvjoin(current_ahv_versions, "|")
      | eval src="hst" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:inventory" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval last_inventory_time=tonumber(coalesce(last_inventory_time, lastInventoryTime, "0"), 10)
      | eval inv_s=tonumber(coalesce(inventory_age_seconds, inventoryAgeSeconds, "0"), 10)
      | eval src="lcmi" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:available_versions" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval ahv_mismatch=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(ahv_mismatch, ahvIncompat, ahv_mismatch_count, "0")), 10)
      | eval src="lcmv" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:lcm:upgrade_history" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | sort 0 - _time
      | dedup cluster_uuid
      | eval st=coalesce(status, Status, last_status, upg_status, "")
      | eval last_lcm_upgrade_status=trim(tostring(st))
      | eval src="lcmh" ]
    [ search (index=hci OR index=nutanix) sourcetype="nutanix:ncc:check_status" earliest=-24h@h
      | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, clusterId, cluster)
      | eval ncc_version=coalesce(ncc_version, nccVersion, nccV)
      | eval fcnt=tonumber(coalesce(failed_check_count, failedCheckCount, "0"), 10)
      | eval kw=tonumber(coalesce(ncc_info_warning_count, kWarningCount, precheck_info_warn, "0"), 10)
      | eval src="ncc" ]
| eval ckey=coalesce(cluster_uuid, "NONE")
| where ckey!="NONE" AND isnotnull(ckey)
| stats latest(eval(if((src="clu"), current_aos_version, null()))) as current_aos_version
    latest(eval(if((src="clu"), cluster_name, null()))) as clu_name
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), distinct_ahv_versions, null()))) as distinct_ahv_versions
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), current_ahv_strings, null()))) as current_ahv_strings
    latest(eval(if((src="hst"), first_host_time, null()))) as first_host_time
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmi"), last_inventory_time, null()))) as last_inventory_time
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmi"), inv_s, null()))) as inv_s
    max(eval(if((src="lcmi"), _time, null()))) as last_inv_s_ev
    max(eval(if((src="lcmv"), ahv_mismatch, null()))) as ahv_mismatch
    latest(eval(if((src="lcmh"), last_lcm_upgrade_status, null()))) as last_lcm_upgrade_status
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), fcnt, null()))) as failed_check_count
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), ncc_version, null()))) as ncc_version
    max(eval(if((src="ncc"), kw, null()))) as ncc_kwarn
  by ckey
| rename ckey as cluster_uuid
| eval cluster_name=if(isnotnull(clu_name) AND len(tostring(clu_name))>0, clu_name, tostring(cluster_uuid))
| eval current_ahv_versions=if(isnotnull(current_ahv_strings) AND len(tostring(current_ahv_strings))>0, current_ahv_strings, "unknown")
| eval last_inv=tonumber(tostring(last_inventory_time), 10)
| eval inv_s2=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(inv_s, 0)), 10)
| eval inventory_age_hours=if( (inv_s2>0), round((inv_s2/3600), 3), if( (last_inv>1), if( (last_inv>2000000000000), round(((now()-(last_inv/1000000.0))/3600), 3), if( (last_inv>2000000000), round(((now()-(last_inv/1000.0))/3600), 3), round(((now()-last_inv)/3600), 3) ) ), null() ) )
| eval mixed_persist=if( (isnotnull(distinct_ahv_versions)) AND (distinct_ahv_versions>1) AND (isnotnull(first_host_time)) AND ( (now()-first_host_time) > 86400 ), 1, 0)
| join type=left max=0 cluster_uuid
    [| inputlookup nutanix_lcm_target_versions
     | eval cluster_uuid=coalesce(cluster_uuid, clusterUuid, tostring(id))
     | eval cluster_name_lu=coalesce(cluster_name, clusterName, tostring(name))
     | eval target_aos_version=coalesce(target_aos_version, targetAos, "")
     | eval target_ahv_version=coalesce(target_ahv_version, targetAhv, "")
     | eval target_ncc_version=coalesce(target_ncc_version, targetNcc, "")
     | eval aos_n_minus_allowed=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(aos_n_minus_allowed, "1")), 10)
     | eval ahv_n_minus_allowed=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(ahv_n_minus_allowed, "1")), 10)
     | eval business_service=coalesce(business_service, businessService, "")
     | eval owner_email=coalesce(owner_email, ownerEmail, "")
     | eval change_freeze_until=coalesce(change_freeze_until, changeFreezeUntil, "")
     | fields + cluster_uuid, cluster_name_lu, target_aos_version, target_ahv_version, target_ncc_version, aos_n_minus_allowed, ahv_n_minus_allowed, business_service, owner_email, change_freeze_until ]
| eval cluster_name=coalesce(cluster_name, cluster_name_lu, cluster_uuid)
| join type=left max=0 current_aos_version
    [| inputlookup nutanix_supported_aos_catalog
     | eval current_aos_version=coalesce(aos_version, aosVersion)
     | eval cur_lr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(lineage_rank, "0")), 10)
     | eval is_supported_until_epoch=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(is_supported_until_epoch, "0")), 10)
     | eval is_lts=if(match(lower(tostring(coalesce(is_lts, isLts, "false"))), "(1|t|y|true)"), 1, 0)
     | eval is_sts=if(match(lower(tostring(coalesce(is_sts, isSts, "false"))), "(1|t|y|true)"), 1, 0)
     | eval compatible_ahv_versions=coalesce(compatible_ahv_versions, compatibleAhv, "")
     | eval min_ncc_version=coalesce(min_ncc_version, minNcc, "")
     | fields + current_aos_version, cur_lr, is_supported_until_epoch, is_lts, is_sts, compatible_ahv_versions, min_ncc_version ]
| join type=left max=0 target_aos_version
    [| inputlookup nutanix_supported_aos_catalog
     | eval target_aos_version=coalesce(aos_version, aosVersion)
     | eval tgt_lr=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(lineage_rank, "0")), 10)
     | fields + target_aos_version, tgt_lr ]
| fillnull value=0 cur_lr tgt_lr ahv_mismatch
| fillnull value=1 aos_n_minus_allowed
| eval n_minus_actual=if( (isnotnull(cur_lr)) AND (isnotnull(tgt_lr)) AND (tgt_lr>0) AND (cur_lr>0), if( (tgt_lr-cur_lr) > 0, tgt_lr - cur_lr, 0), null() )
| eval ahv_incompat=if( (isnotnull(ahv_mismatch)) AND (ahv_mismatch>0), 1, if( (isnotnull(compatible_ahv_versions)) AND (len(tostring(compatible_ahv_versions))>0) AND (isnotnull(mvindex(split(tostring(current_ahv_versions), "|"),0))) AND ( !like(compatible_ahv_versions, "%".tostring(mvindex(split(tostring(current_ahv_versions), "|"),0))."%") ) , 1, 0) )
| eval ncc_older=if( (isnotnull(min_ncc_version)) AND (len(tostring(min_ncc_version))>0) AND (isnotnull(ncc_version)) AND (tostring(ncc_version)!=tostring(min_ncc_version)) AND (tonumber(replace(tostring(ncc_version), "\\D", ""), 10) < tonumber(replace(tostring(min_ncc_version), "\\D", ""), 10)), 1, if( (isnotnull(ncc_version)) AND (isnotnull(min_ncc_version)) AND (tostring(ncc_version)<tostring(min_ncc_version)), 1, 0) )
| eval precheck_warn=if( ( (isnotnull(failed_check_count)) AND (failed_check_count>0) AND (failed_check_count<8) ) OR ( (isnotnull(ncc_kwarn)) AND (ncc_kwarn>0) ), 1, 0)
| eval cft1=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z")
| eval cft2=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval cft3=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")
| eval cft4=strptime(tostring(coalesce(change_freeze_until, "")), "%Y-%m-%d")
| eval freeze_active=if( (isnotnull(cft1)) OR (isnotnull(cft2)) OR (isnotnull(cft3)) OR (isnotnull(cft4)), if( now() < coalesce(cft1, cft2, cft3, cft4, 0), 1, 0), 0 )
| eval sev0=case(
  (isnotnull(is_supported_until_epoch)) AND (is_supported_until_epoch>0) AND (is_supported_until_epoch<now()), "critical",
  (tostring(last_lcm_upgrade_status)="Failed"), "critical",
  (isnotnull(distinct_ahv_versions)) AND (mixed_persist=1), "high",
  (isnotnull(n_minus_actual)) AND (n_minus_actual>tonumber(tostring(aos_n_minus_allowed), 10)), "high",
  (ahv_incompat=1), "high",
  (ncc_older=1), "medium",
  (isnotnull(inventory_age_hours)) AND (inventory_age_hours>168), "medium",
  (precheck_warn=1), "low",
  1=1, "ok"
)
| eval severity_bucket=if( (freeze_active=1) AND ( (sev0="critical") OR (sev0="high") ), if( (sev0="critical"), "medium", "low" ), sev0 )
| table cluster_uuid, cluster_name, current_aos_version, target_aos_version, n_minus_actual, aos_n_minus_allowed, current_ahv_versions, target_ahv_version, distinct_ahv_versions, ncc_version, min_ncc_version, inventory_age_hours, is_supported_until_epoch, severity_bucket, freeze_active, business_service, owner_email
| sort 0 - severity_bucket, cluster_name
```

## Visualization

Heatmap of n_minus versus allowed N-minus, bar chart of clusters with more than one distinct AHV, column chart of ncc_version against min_ncc_version, gauge of inventory_age_hours, timeline of LCM upgrade_history status, and a supporting single value of EOL-breach or Failed-upgrade counts, each panel drilling to Prism and raw HEC for the same cluster token.

## References

- [Splunk Add-on for Nutanix Prism (Splunkbase 5076)](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/5076)
- [Nutanix — Portal documentation and AOS LTS/STS](https://portal.nutanix.com/)
- [Nutanix Developer — REST and Prism context](https://www.nutanix.dev/)
